text: Application software automatically rejected female applicants age 55 or older and male applicants age 60 or older. The EEOC alleged the screening logic unlawfully denied older applicants an employment opportunity.
mitigation_gap: No pre-deployment age-discrimination audit or human override prevented hard-coded age thresholds from eliminating qualified applicants.
reliance_or_harm: More than 200 applicants were allegedly rejected; company settled with EEOC for $365,000 and injunctive relief.
